message:
fix: populate Usage.Raw with actual provider usage data

Each adapter's parseUsage function was creating an empty map for Usage.Raw
instead of passing through the raw provider usage data. Callers that need
provider-specific details (e.g., reasoning_tokens, cached_tokens) can now
access them via Usage.Raw.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
